# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- When implementing the justified-layout algorithm, always reference the original JavaScript library (in CollageMaker/justified-layout/ directory) as the ground truth. Don't make assumptions about how it should work - trace through the actual JavaScript code to understand the exact behavior, especially for:
1. Row creation and initialization
2. How AddItem() completes and positions rows
3. Main algorithm loop control flow
4. Padding and spacing application
5. Width calculation for justification
